title: lithospermum guatemalense
intro: Lithospermum guatemalense, also known as Guatemalan gromwell, is a flowering plant species in the borage family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of lithospermic acid. The health benefits of Lithospermum guatemalense include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin issues, as well as its ability to support immune function. Lithospermum guatemalense can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or topical cream, making it a versatile herbal remedy.
